analysis: The project is a static website with multiple themes and configurations. The current event focuses on black holes, requiring a UI theme with animated objects, slides, and pages about black holes. The existing to-dos indicate incomplete CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files, particularly in the test-website directory. The theme should incorporate a dark, cosmic aesthetic with animations and interactive elements related to black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including the showSlide function and mobile menu toggle functionality. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
